subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is one of Thy handmaidens - enable her to attain that which Thou hast ordained for her in Thy days, and I bear witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذه امه من امائک بلغها الی ما قدرت لها فی ایامک و اشهد
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for women
